name: Release Verification, Monitoring, And Growth Handoff Audit Wrap-Up

decision.summary: Phase E is complete as an audit, evidence, monitoring, and handoff wrap-up. It is not a release approval. The board remains closed as an evidence-backed no-go classification because production HTTP behavior, platform readbacks, owner proof, accessibility/mobile evidence, Figma Make preview parity, and live static SEO asset parity remain blocking.

phaseTaskResults.result: Figma Make source sync ledger is recorded. Preview smoke and four public [TBD] service placeholder patches remain open.
Live HTTP and rendered browser evidence is recorded. Production still fails static asset, raw HTML metadata/schema, redirect, private route, and soft-404 policy.
Rendered service, contact, catalog, product, cart, and checkout journeys were smoke-tested. Accessibility and mobile evidence blockers remain open.
A failing production drift baseline, monitoring cadence, owners, incident runbook, rollback path, and review triggers are recorded.
Final not-release-ready and not-growth-ready classification is recorded with blockers visible.

stageGateResult.reason: Launch and growth gates cannot pass with unresolved production HTTP/static/redirect/private/error blockers, missing provider/platform evidence, missing owner proof, and open accessibility/mobile evidence.

blockersCarriedForward.blocker: Production runtime parity is not proven; live HTTP evidence still shows stale generic SPA-shell behavior instead of the intended repo build plus Pages Functions policy.
blockersCarriedForward.verification: Deploy current repo build and Functions to the canonical production host, then rerun the live HTTP and browser matrices.

blockersCarriedForward.blocker: Critical static SEO assets and commerce feed endpoints are not served correctly on production.
blockersCarriedForward.verification: /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, product sitemap URLs, and Merchant feed URL return expected status, content type, cache headers, and non-HTML body.

blockersCarriedForward.blocker: Private/admin/account, invalid, and unknown routes return public HTTP 200 shell responses at the edge.
blockersCarriedForward.verification: Private routes return safe 401/403/404 or protected noindex policy, and unknown routes/products return real 404/410.

blockersCarriedForward.blocker: Legacy service/catalog aliases and opaque product identifier URLs do not redirect server-side to canonical destinations in production.
blockersCarriedForward.verification: Sampled legacy paths and product UUID/GTIN/SKU URLs return one-hop permanent redirects to canonical slugs.

blockersCarriedForward.blocker: Cloudflare, Search Console, Google Business Profile, Merchant Center, GA4/analytics, logs, field Core Web Vitals, and owner evidence are unavailable.
blockersCarriedForward.verification: Least-privilege authenticated readbacks record property/account IDs, diagnostics, submitted assets, alerts, limitations, and evidence ownership.

blockersCarriedForward.blocker: Accessibility, SXO, and mobile journey blockers remain open in shared header, checkout, catalog, product media controls, and mobile evidence.
blockersCarriedForward.verification: Desktop and mobile customer-journey audits pass with stable labels, accessible names, focus order, field state, and safe high-impact actions.

blockersCarriedForward.blocker: Owner proof is unavailable for local facts, citations, GBP, claims, reviews/ratings, media, warranty/liability/policies, and service/product evidence.
blockersCarriedForward.verification: Owner-approved evidence package reconciles public copy, schema, feed/profile facts, policy claims, and local/service/product proof.

blockersCarriedForward.blocker: Figma Make preview smoke is unavailable and pushed Figma Make source still has four public [TBD] service placeholders.
blockersCarriedForward.verification: Patch the exact Figma Make service files, push/sync, then run preview browser and console smoke.

remediationSequence: Remediation-1 - Production Runtime Parity, Static Assets, Redirects, And Provider Readback
Remediation-2 - Raw HTML Metadata, Schema, Private/Error Status, And Soft-404 Fixes
Remediation-3 - Figma Make Preview Parity And Placeholder Cleanup
Remediation-4 - Accessibility, SXO, Mobile Journey, And Checkout Control Fixes
Remediation-5 - Owner Evidence, Platform Readbacks, Measurement Reconciliation, And Monitoring Activation
Rerun E-2 through E-5 only after the remediation gates pass.

figmaMakeSync.policy: None. This wrap-up created docs/evidence artifacts only and did not add new Figma Make source files.

verification.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['.growth-work/release/phase-e-release-verification-monitoring-growth-handoff-preanalysis-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/e1-figma-make-preview-verification-patch-state-ledger-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/e2-production-crawl-rendered-head-schema-browser-matrix-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/e3-accessibility-sxo-checkout-customer-journey-smoke-2026-06-23.json','.seo-work/crawl/e4-drift-baseline-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/e4-drift-baseline-monitoring-incident-runbook-owners-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/e5-final-growth-readiness-classification-board-wrap-up-2026-06-23.json','.growth-work/release/phase-e-release-verification-monitoring-growth-handoff-wrapup-2026-06-23.json']; for (const f of files) { JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')); console.log(f+' ok'); }"

rg -n 'Phase E - Release Verification|Progress: `\[█████\] 100%`|Phase E Wrap-Up|Audited wrap-up complete|phase-e-release-verification-monitoring-growth-handoff-wrapup|PHASE-E-RELEASE-VERIFICATION-MONITORING-GROWTH-HANDOFF-WRAPUP|NOT RELEASE-READY|NOT GROWTH-READY|DO NOT SCALE' .growth-work/boards/MITRA_GROWTH_READINESS_IMPLEMENTATION_BOARD_2026-06-22.md .seo-work/reports/PHASE-E-RELEASE-VERIFICATION-MONITORING-GROWTH-HANDOFF-WRAPUP-2026-06-23.md

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['.growth-work/boards/MITRA_GROWTH_READINESS_IMPLEMENTATION_BOARD_2026-06-22.md','.growth-work/release/phase-e-release-verification-monitoring-growth-handoff-wrapup-2026-06-23.json','.seo-work/reports/PHASE-E-RELEASE-VERIFICATION-MONITORING-GROWTH-HANDOFF-WRAPUP-2026-06-23.md']; const bad=[]; for (const f of files) { const lines=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').split(/
/); lines.forEach((line,index)=>{ if (/[ 	]+$/.test(line)) bad.push(f+':'+(index+1)); }); } if (bad.length) { console.error('trailing whitespace:
'+bad.join('
')); process.exit(1); } console.log('no trailing whitespace');"

noGuarantee: This Phase E wrap-up improves evidence discipline and remediation focus. It does not guarantee crawling, indexing, selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, local-pack visibility, Merchant Center approval, traffic, conversions, revenue, ROI, or AI inclusion.
